author: Claude Code
content:
Starting work on this issue. All implementation is already complete. Creating issue retroactively to document the work done.

## Changes made

### Server (`server.ts`)
- Extended `addComment()` to support `type` and `done` fields for todo-type comments
- Added `updateComment()` function + `PUT /api/issues/{ID}/comments/{COMMENT_ID}` route for toggling todo completion
- Added `getTodos()` function + `GET /api/todos` route that scans all issues for todo-type comments, enriches with issue metadata, sorts open first

### API Client (`ui/js/api.js`)
- Added `updateComment(issueId, commentId, data)` method
- Added `getTodos()` method

### Issue Detail (`ui/js/views/detail.js`)
- Todo-type comments render with a checkbox (toggleable via API)
- Added "Add Todo" button next to "Add Comment"
- Checkbox change handler calls `API.updateComment()` and re-renders

### New Todos View (`ui/js/views/todos.js`)
- Lists all todos from `GET /api/todos`
- Each row: checkbox, content text, clickable issue link
- Segmented filter buttons (Open / All / Closed) with counts, matching board's done-filter style
- Empty state messages per filter context

### Router + Nav (`ui/js/app.js`, `ui/index.html`)
- "Todos" nav link added to header
- Route `/todos` mapped to `renderTodos` view
- URL parsing for direct navigation

### Styles (`ui/css/styles.css`)
- Todo checkbox and strikethrough styling in comments
- Todos view layout (container, rows, filter buttons)
- Reuses `.done-filter-btn` pattern from board view

### Template synced
- `rsync -av --delete ui/ template/.project/ui/`
- `cp server.ts template/.project/server.ts`

## Files modified
- `server.ts`
- `ui/js/api.js`
- `ui/js/views/detail.js`
- `ui/js/views/todos.js` (new)
- `ui/js/app.js`
- `ui/index.html`
- `ui/css/styles.css`
- `template/.project/server.ts`
- `template/.project/ui/` (synced)
